graduation_rules.programme_name: Bachelor of Mechanical Engineering with Honours
required_components: Final examination pass requirement for mechanical subjects
graduation_logic_notes: Mechanical engineering students must pass the final examination for mechanical subjects as a mandatory requirement to pass the subject.
Industrial training must be conducted before the final semester.
graduation_rules.handbook_reference: AME303 academic landscape and passing condition

graduation_logic_notes: The November handbook explicitly states overall total credit hours = 120.
Final Year Project consists of IT Project I (3 credits) and IT Project II (4 credits).
Industrial Training is 6 credits and requires completed 86 credit hours.
Apprenticeship may replace Industrial Training with approval from the Industrial Training Coordinator.
graduation_rules.handbook_reference: CIT314 – Bachelor in Software Engineering (Honours) Academic Landscape November Intake
